name: generic_visual_focus
description: Creates a concrete visualization artifact under artifacts/ that highlights salient object-like regions and annotates their horizontal centers to support later left/right relation reasoning. The implementation ensures a real processed image ndarray is always produced for valid image inputs, converts draw targets to numpy arrays before OpenCV rendering, saves the artifact before returning, and uses a fallback visualization artifact if primary region extraction fails.
applicability_conditions: Creates a concrete visualization artifact under artifacts/ that highlights salient object-like regions and annotates their horizontal centers to support later left/right relation reasoning. The implementation ensures a real processed image ndarray is always produced for valid image inputs, converts draw targets to numpy arrays before OpenCV rendering, saves the artifact before returning, and uses a fallback visualization artifact if primary region extraction fails.
